channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Blood-feeding fly loses its vision after finding a host
item.description: Deer keds use flight and sight to locate a host, but once they land, they shed their wings and reduce their eyesight.

item.title: Single protein may be limiting CAR T cancer therapy effectiveness
item.description: Researchers have identified NFIL3 as a key protein that may be hindering the success of CAR T-cell therapy.

item.title: A stellar 'Rosetta stone' reveals the source of mysterious cosmic signals
item.description: Astronomers have solved the mystery behind a strange class of repeating cosmic signals that has puzzled scientists for years. Using Australia...

item.title: NSF commits $8B to sustain U.S. scientific presence in Antarctica
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation announced today it awarded KBR Services LLC (KBR) the Antarctic Science and Engineering Support Contract to provi...
